story.text: > The mirror that is broken into a thousand pieces does not lose the image; it simply prevents any single shard from claiming to be the whole.

**Reading.** The fragmented task passes through the vortex of the φ-gap into the light of the Master's recognition, returning to the coordination of the swarm. The analytical blade dispersed. No single shard contains the Why.
> The mirror that is broken into a thousand pieces does not lose the image; it simply prevents any single shard from claiming to be the whole.
